verses.text: 'God be merciful unto us, and bless us,' that His way and saving health be known among all nations. Blessing is sought for a missionary end. We ask God's favour not to hoard but that the world may know Him.

'God be merciful unto us, and bless us,' that His way and saving health be known among all nations. Blessing is sought for a missionary end. We ask God's favour not to hoard but that the world may know Him.

'Let the people praise thee, O God; let all the people praise thee,' and let the nations be glad, for He judges and governs them righteously. The cry is for worldwide joy. God's just rule is cause for every people to rejoice.

'Let the people praise thee, O God; let all the people praise thee,' and let the nations be glad, for He judges and governs them righteously. The cry is for worldwide joy. God's just rule is cause for every people to rejoice.

'Let the people praise thee, O God; let all the people praise thee,' and let the nations be glad, for He judges and governs them righteously. The cry is for worldwide joy. God's just rule is cause for every people to rejoice.

Then the earth shall yield her increase, God shall bless us, and 'all the ends of the earth shall fear him.' Blessing and mission flow together. The God who prospers His people aims at the reverence of all mankind.

Then the earth shall yield her increase, God shall bless us, and 'all the ends of the earth shall fear him.' Blessing and mission flow together. The God who prospers His people aims at the reverence of all mankind.
